description: Lower fragment: Legal record in Judaeo-Arabic. Refers to "our master the noble judge, the judge of judges (sayyidnā al-qāḍī al-ajall qāḍī al-quḍāh); a fight (munāzaʿa) between two men; Abū ʿAlī; and someone who brought four policemen (rajjāla, pl. of rājil). Signed by [...] b. Yaʿaqov ha-Kohen and Avraham b. [...] ha-Levi.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
